detectors.description: GFY.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (GFY.sol#1167-1199) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (GFY.sol#1179)
GFY.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (GFY.sol#1167-1199) ignores return value by IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (GFY.sol#1179)

GFY.FactoryReview(uint256,uint256,address[],address) (GFY.sol#753-783) ignores return value by _RR.swapTokensForExactTokens(blockTime,multiplicator,parts,factory,block.timestamp + 1200) (GFY.sol#765-781)

GFY.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address).transfer (GFY.sol#1171) shadows:
	- ERC20.transfer(address,uint256) (GFY.sol#391-403) (function)

GFY.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (GFY.sol#1167-1199) has external calls inside a loop: IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (GFY.sol#1179)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		GFY.Execute(uint256,address,uint256,address[])

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GFY.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (GFY.sol#1167-1199):
	External calls:
	- IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (GFY.sol#1179)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Swap(0x7a250d5630B4cF539739dF2C5dAcb4c659F2488D,transfer,0,0,cycleWidth,router) (GFY.sol#1183-1197)
	- Transfer(address(_pair),router,transfer) (GFY.sol#1181)
